log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Grung — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Grung — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Grung — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Grung — Winged Striker HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Grung — Winged Striker HP: 29/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Grung — Winged Striker HP: 9/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Grung — Winged Striker --- HP: 9/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (9/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Grung — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Grung — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Grung — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Grung — Winged Striker HP: -8/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Grung — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Grung — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
